flashcards.definition: A graph showing the solubility of a substance vs. temperature.
Points on the curve = saturated; below = unsaturated; above = supersaturated.
Most solids: solubility increases with temperature (upward-sloping curve).
Some salts (e.g., Ce₂(SO₄)₃): solubility decreases with temperature.
Gas solubility always decreases with increasing temperature.
